description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push events with tags. For the repository owned by ant-design-blazor, set up an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, installs .NET SDKs (3.1.x to 9.0.x) and Node.js 16.x, then packages and publishes NuGet packages using the NUGET_API_KEY from secrets, and finally uploads the package artifact with a 5-day retention.
